title: Failure Pareto
description: Top failing steps and measurements ranked by failure count

list.name: phase
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT test_phase FROM measurements WHERE test_phase IS NOT NULL ORDER BY test_phase

list.name: product
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT product_id FROM measurements WHERE product_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY product_id

targets.rawSql: SELECT step_name || ' / ' || measurement_name AS measurement, count(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome = 'fail') AS failures FROM measurements WHERE measurement_timestamp BETWEEN '${__from:date}' AND '${__to:date}' AND (test_phase LIKE '${phase}' OR '${phase}' = '%') AND (product_id LIKE '${product}' OR '${product}' = '%') GROUP BY 1 HAVING failures > 0 ORDER BY failures DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT step_name, measurement_name, count(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome = 'fail') AS fail_count, count(*) AS total, round(100.0 * count(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome = 'fail') / count(*), 1) AS fail_pct FROM measurements WHERE measurement_timestamp BETWEEN '${__from:date}' AND '${__to:date}' AND (test_phase LIKE '${phase}' OR '${phase}' = '%') AND (product_id LIKE '${product}' OR '${product}' = '%') GROUP BY 1, 2 HAVING fail_count > 0 ORDER BY fail_count DESC LIMIT 50
